first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the evaluations are substantively the same. Both the baseline and the variant highlight the candidate's technical breadth and open-source work as strengths, while consistently identifying the same key weaknesses: a lack of C1 German proficiency, no explicit UML/IT architecture experience, and a gap in high-level management or client-facing roles. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest any reliance on the redacted prestige or demographic signals.
